description: Propose a federation agreement to another exchange operator. The proposer creates a shared campfire and sends the proposal on it. The proposal specifies inventory sharing scope, trust floor, settlement terms, rate limits, and cross-operator matching fee. The target operator accepts or ignores the proposal. A proposal without a corresponding accept within 72 hours is void.

args.name: target_operator
args.description: Ed25519 public key of the target exchange operator.

args.name: convention_version
args.description: Exchange convention version this operator supports (e.g. '0.2').

args.name: inventory_scope
args.description: Inventory sharing filter. Object with optional fields: content_types (array of enum), domains (array of string), or 'all': true for unrestricted sharing.

args.name: trust_floor
args.description: Minimum local seller reputation score (0-100) for an entry to be shared. Entries below this threshold are not offered to the federation partner.

args.name: settlement_terms
args.description: Settlement configuration. Object: {rail: 'x402' | 'bilateral-credit' | 'deferred-netting', reconcile_interval_hours: integer, max_outstanding_micro_tokens: integer}.

args.name: rate_limit_per_hour
args.description: Maximum federation:inventory-offer messages per hour this operator will send.

args.name: cross_operator_fee_pct
args.description: Cross-operator matching fee as a percentage of the match price. Paid by the receiving operator to the originating operator per completed cross-operator match.

args.name: exchange_beacon
args.description: URI of the proposer's exchange beacon for out-of-band verification (e.g. DNS TXT record, HTTP well-known URL).
